install_hint.macos: Install Python 3 and ensure python3 is in PATH.
install_hint.linux: Install python3 and ensure it is in PATH.
install_hint.windows: Install Python 3 or the py launcher and ensure it is in PATH.

install_hint.macos: Install AWS CLI v2 and ensure aws is in PATH.
install_hint.linux: Install AWS CLI v2 and ensure aws is in PATH.
install_hint.windows: Install AWS CLI v2 and ensure aws.exe is in PATH.

install_hint.macos: Install jq and ensure jq is in PATH.
install_hint.linux: Install jq and ensure jq is in PATH.
install_hint.windows: Install jq and ensure jq.exe is in PATH.

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Run the simulation emergency backlog audit
